title: From prompt to a fully working real-time voice app in seconds. 🎙️✨
summary: Google AI Studio enables developers to build, deploy, and remix real-time AI voice applications from natural language prompts. The tool transforms development workflows from static code to dynamic agentic systems using Gemini models.
writeup: This video demonstrates how Google AI Studio builds, deploys, and remixes real-time AI voice applications from a single voice prompt. It matters because it shifts development from static code toward dynamic agentic workflows, cutting deployment time significantly. The key takeaway: a spoken prompt can produce a working real-time voice app, with the tool spanning concepts including agentic workflows, on-device AI, and speech recognition.
